description_long: This rifle features a modern, tactical design with a predominantly black body accented by striking red components. It is equipped with a large scope mounted on the top rail, suggesting precision for long-range targeting. The stock is skeletonized, providing reduced weight and a distinctive appearance, while the pistol grip and adjustable cheek rest enhance ergonomic handling. The barrel is long and heavy, fitted with a prominent red muzzle brake for recoil reduction. A bipod is attached beneath the fore-end, allowing for stable shooting from a supported position. The magazine is a detachable box type, visible just ahead of the trigger guard.
description: A modern, black and red tactical rifle with a skeletonized stock, large scope, heavy barrel, red muzzle brake, and bipod for stability.
description_view_0: Front view showing the red muzzle brake, bipod legs, and the alignment of the scope above the barrel.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the long barrel, large scope, skeletonized stock, pistol grip, bipod, and detachable box magazine.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the skeletonized stock, cheek rest, and the back of the scope.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile showing the same features as view 1, with clear visibility of the bipod and muzzle brake.
